category_sources: Official Knot DNS homepage says it is a high-performance authoritative DNS server.
source_facts.description says high-performance authoritative-only DNS server.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and documentation use the display name Knot DNS.
docs_sources: Official Knot DNS Documentation page lists current stable HTML, single-page, PDF, and EPUB docs.
repo_sources: Official Knot DNS Development page lists https://gitlab.nic.cz/knot/knot-dns.git as the CZ.NIC GitLab repository and identifies GitHub as a mirror.
tags_sources: Official Knot DNS homepage lists DNS features including IXFR, DDNS, RRL, and automatic DNSSEC signing.
source_facts.description identifies authoritative DNS server role.
